creator: sbz@FreeBSD.org
text:
Kurt,

any reason why you want to add a patch not yet committed upstream ? In general, I prefer to stick to the upstream release.

In case, you need it, our ports infrastructure allow you to use add patches you make into ${FILESDIR} folder. Then you can generate a package using poudriere bulk or make package target which suits your needs.

I will commit the update tomorrow.
